title: 5 things God builds in a man who shows up
caption:
God builds slowly. But he builds.

Every hard thing you show up for in your 20s — the early morning, the work no one sees, the rep that doesn't pay out yet — God is building something through it.

Not a platform. Not a following. A man.

The character that comes before the career. The capacity built from the reps you took when you didn't feel like it. The self-knowledge that only comes from being tested. A name that means something because you showed up when it would've been easier not to.

And eventually — a man built to carry what God puts in his hands.

"Act like men. Be strong." — 1 Cor 16:13

Your 20s aren't a waiting room. They're a construction site.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
